title: Real-time RT-PCR datasets for the CEO study
author: Pasha, Ali
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Real-time RT-PCR results of testing citrus essential oils for viroid transmission.  
 Ct values of each run are listed in Excel sheet according to the respective experiment.
